title: Tags
subtitle: Manage tags to attach to expenses and filter your data.

form.reactivateHint: If the name matches a deleted tag, that tag will be restored.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.body: This tag will no longer appear when creating new data, but all historical data is preserved. You can review deleted tags by turning on "Show deleted tags".

empty.title: No tags yet
empty.body: You haven't created any tags. Add a tag to classify your expenses.
